channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Fireworks, heat, hot dogs and politics: America celebrates its 250th birthday
item.description: The 250th anniversary of American independence is colliding with political polarization and a heat wave as celebrations get underway across the United States on Saturday.

item.title: Searing heat and storms mar holiday with 3 children dead in Wisconsin and utility outages widespread
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce marry in front of famous friends at Madison Square Garden
